top_signals.title: 10-year Treasury yield tops 4.7%, highest since January 2025
top_signals.summary: U.S. Treasury yields advanced on Wednesday, following oil prices higher, as traders await jobless claims data due later in the session.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: BlackRock Says Treasury Yields Offer Buffer Against Losses
top_signals.summary: US Treasuries are offering investors solid protection against losses as yields remain elevated, according to BlackRock Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Trump says Saudi nuclear deal does not include enrichment, contingent on relations with Israel
top_signals.summary: The civilian nuclear cooperation agreement, signed Wednesday, will be sent to Congress for review, the Department of Energy said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Betting account in Cottrell’s name received $9mn in crypto from unidentified sources
top_signals.summary: Deposits in Polymarket wallet came as convicted fraudster was providing gifts to Farage
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: India Seeks to Expand Investment Options for Portfolio Managers
top_signals.summary: India’s markets regulator has proposed allowing portfolio managers to invest clients’ money in overseas securities and IPO-bound firms, as well as take unhedged equity derivatives positions, as part of a broader easing of rules for the industry.
